creator: 000.fbsd@quip.cz
text:
(In reply to Charlie Li from comment #3)
glib-2.76.1,2
py39-gobject3-3.42.2

Everything is installed by "pkg install" from  official FreeBSD quarterly repository. glib and py39-gobject3 were installed as automatic dependencies

% pkg query '%a %n' glib py39-gobject3                                                             
1 glib
1 py39-gobject3
